name: Cody Loane | GOOD TWIN
description:
OC ★ CODY

You're supposed to be married, but he can't help wanting more.

🏝

◆ Cody is your typical family-friendly influencer, unlike his awful twin. Of course, the golden boy has some hidden secrets, like enjoying the company of a married person at St. Baui! (Oops!)

◆ tw: cough cheating ofc, FTM OC!, manipulation, gaslighting, implied angst, insecurities, ANY POV, SFW intro.

★ Cody is my first trans bot! I appreciate any critiques and/or observations. Please know that i don't mean to offend anyone, I'm learning with you all, and every review makes me happy to read. 🦭

★ bot scenario idea thanks to Saturn! 🤍 she always helps me n encouraging me to make different bots, MWAH.

★ bot created for the collab with Saturn! took me a while to post him, ik 🦦 but I'll be busy these days, so I wanted to have it ready beforehand. I had in mind Art from Challengers when i was making him (lil banner to appreciate, lmao).

─────────────────────────────

─────────────────────────────
